title: Healthier Orange Creamsicle Protein Ice Cream
instructions: Spin on the Lite Ice Cream setting.
Add 1 tbsp milk and re-spin 1–2x until smooth.
prepNotes: tastes like a copycat DQ Orange Julius

title: Apple Butter Biscoff Protein Ice Cream
ingredients: 1–2 tbsp apple butter or apple pie filling
Pinch of cinnamon/nutmeg or apple pie spice (not too much!)
instructions: Mix base ingredients together in a Ninja Creami pint and freeze 24 hours.
Once frozen, spin on the Lite Ice Cream setting.
Add in apple butter and Biscoff cookies as mix-ins and spin on respin.
prepNotes: The perfect holiday Creami recipe! (Apple Butter Biscoff / Apple Pie Biscoff)

title: Sweet Potato Ninja Creami Ice Cream
ingredients: 150 g sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated milk)
instructions: Whisk all ingredients together until smooth and spices are integrated.
Pour into the 470ml tub and freeze 16–24 hours with the lid off.
Process on the ice cream function. Re-spin for a fluffier texture if desired.
Return leftovers to the freezer with the lid on.
prepNotes: Equipment: NC300 Ninja Creami machine with 470ml tubs. Sweet potato must be 100% puree, no added sugar/syrup. Canned sweet potato not tested. Lactose-free cream/milk can be substituted.

title: Classic Ice Cream Base Recipe
ingredients: 1 tbsp cream cheese (optional — makes the ice cream thicker)
instructions: Mix all ingredients together in a pint tub and freeze 24 hours
Once frozen, spin on the ice cream setting.
The ice cream will come out slightly crumbly — add 1 tbsp milk and respin.
prepNotes: For a thicker, still-creamy texture, freeze an additional 1–3 hours.

title: Peanut Butter Icecream
instructions: mix all and pour in tub

title: Chocolate Icecream 1
instructions: Heat milk and sugar to melt
